query:
INSERT INTO product_images (productId, imageUrl, imageKey, sortOrder, isPrimary, createdAt, updatedAt)
SELECT id, 'https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310519663334223494/HOHqwtwokCYCgOWA.png', 'dining-chair-01.png', 0, 1, NOW(), NOW() FROM products WHERE sku = 'DC-001-GRY'
UNION ALL
SELECT id, 'https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310519663334223494/cTPcPiQlHioOZArZ.png', 'dining-chair-02.png', 0, 1, NOW(), NOW() FROM products WHERE sku = 'DC-002-WAL'
UNION ALL
SELECT id, 'https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310519663334223494/ZxCuihPldYNdarxT.png', 'dining-chair-03.png', 0, 1, NOW(), NOW() FROM products WHERE sku = 'DC-003-WHT'
UNION ALL
SELECT id, 'https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310519663334223494/uMsReZrltVdpkyAM.png', 'dining-chair-04.png', 0, 1, NOW(), NOW() FROM products WHERE sku = 'DC-004-NVY'
UNION ALL
SELECT id, 'https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310519663334223494/HvUXcbiBFMPKNECS.png', 'dining-chair-05.png', 0, 1, NOW(), NOW() FROM products WHERE sku = 'DC-005-OAK';
